recent_excerpts: Fast16 malware resurfaces in new supply chain attacks, abusing remote monitoring tools and browser extensions to steal credentials. Campaign targets enterprise environments.
Attackers compromised the elementary-data PyPI package (1.1M monthly downloads) to push an infostealer targeting developer credentials, crypto wallets, and environment variables.
Kaspersky details CrystalX RAT, a MaaS malware with spyware, credential theft, and prankware features targeting Windows users globally since mid-2025.
